name: Okra (Bhindi)
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash the okra and dry it thoroughly.
2. Cut off the pods and slice into small pieces.
3. Chop the onions and tomatoes separately.
4. Deep fry the okra until very brown and crisp.
5. Turn off the heat and remove from oil, then set aside.
6. Add turmeric to hot oil in a frying pan. Add the chopped onions and fry until golden brown.
7. Add the fried okra, salt, and red pepper to the pan. Stir to combine.
8. Cover and bake at 250 degrees Fahrenheit for 15 minutes.
